title: Close-up Lips & Skin
promptText: Close-up focus on a young woman's lips and skin textures. The composition highlights luminous golden skin tones and radiant glow with bold contrast, emphasizing the rich scarlet lips as the central emotional anchor. Subtle lighting creates Rembrandt-inspired depth, soft shadows sculpting the face with cinematic clarity. High resolution, museum-grade detail, expressive realism with painterly warmth, every pore and texture captured as living artistry.
